input.heading: Tax imposed
input.text_preview: (a) Married individuals filing joint returns and surviving spouses There is hereby imposed on the taxable income of— (1) every married individual (as defined in section 7703) who makes a single return jointly with his spouse under section 6013, and (2) every surviving spouse (as defined in section 2(a)), a tax determined in accordance with the following table: If taxable income is: The tax is: Not over $36,900 15% of taxable income. Over $36,900 but not over $89,150 $5,535, plus 28% of the exces...

output.raw_response:
{
  "description": "Temporal constraints for married individuals filing joint returns and surviving spouses",
  "constraints": [
    "marriage_date <= filing_date",
    "marriage_date >= spouse_birthday",
    "marriage_date >= individual_birthday",
    "filing_date >= taxable_year_end",
    "taxable_year_end >= taxable_year_start",
    "taxable_year_end <= taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "filing_date <= taxable_year_end + Period(0, 3, 15)",
    "spouse_death_date >= marriage_date",
    "spouse_death_date <= filing_date"
  ]
}

input.heading: Tax imposed
input.text_preview: (b) Heads of households There is hereby imposed on the taxable income of every head of a household (as defined in section 2(b)) a tax determined in accordance with the following table: If taxable income is: The tax is: Not over $29,600 15% of taxable income. Over $29,600 but not over $76,400 $4,440, plus 28% of the excess over $29,600. Over $76,400 but not over $127,500 $17,544, plus 31% of the excess over $76,400. input.heading: Tax imposed
input.text_preview: (d) Married individuals filing separate returns There is hereby imposed on the taxable income of every married individual (as defined in section 7703) who does not make a single return jointly with his spouse under section 6013, a tax determined in accordance with the following table: If taxable income is: The tax is: Not over $18,450 15% of taxable income. input.heading: Tax imposed
input.text_preview: (e) Estates and trusts There is hereby imposed on the taxable income of— (1) every estate, and (2) every trust, taxable under this subsection a tax determined in accordance with the following table: If taxable income is: The tax is: Not over $1,500 15% of taxable income.
